title: Modifier Icons
description: Adds icons to multiple text entries.
body:
# Modifier Icons


**ONLY ENGLISH IS SUPPORTED FOR NOW**

Adds icons to multiple text entries.

### Examples

- Tooltip armor icons: \
!["Netherite Chestplate" tooltip with icons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602ebab600330f25e211f47453c839a2a40291ee.png)

- Tooltip effect icons: \
!["Potion of the Turtle Master" tooltip with icons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FR28zsxM/images/47c86641f90bdf69bb5d23a943a7d5bf4dad4c66.png)

- Jukebox message icons: \
![Jukebox "Now Playing" message with icons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ddd2701a9abf39e15e7fb178576d0b075bc9317.png)

### Credits

- Icons are either handmade by me or drawn over vanilla Minecraft items.
- Resource pack idea from [Enchant Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchant-icons-countxd).
- Mod name idea from "Modifier Icons" HoI4 Mod.
